reapack.name: ACID Pro Native Grid.lua
reapack.desc: Hybrid ACID Pro-calibrated adaptive grid and 24-step zoom

metadata.description:
ACID Pro-calibrated hybrid grid for REAPER.
Installs two Main-section actions: - ACID Pro hybrid grid - toggle full ACID mode (ReaPack v1.3.0) - ACID Pro native grid - 24-step mousewheel zoom (legacy)
The toolbar mode captures the wheel directly over the arrange view, so no Mousewheel shortcut or Mouse Modifier is required. Levels 0-20 remain fully native. At levels 21-23, one bitmap composited directly into the arrange adds only the subdivisions beyond REAPER's native 1/1024 limit, and simple clicks snap to the matching fine interval. No ReaImGui or floating overlay window is used.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: Initial ReaPack release. - Add 24 ACID Pro-calibrated zoom levels. - Add hard zoom-in and zoom-out limits. - Change the native project-grid division at every level. - Add an optional lightweight background synchronizer.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: - Make toolbar toggle the recommended no-setup mode. - Follow every native REAPER horizontal zoom method automatically. - Show the toolbar button as enabled while adaptive grid is running. - Keep the 24-step mousewheel zoom as an optional hard-limit mode.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: - Make the toolbar button enable the complete ACID mode. - Capture Mousewheel directly over the arrange view through js_ReaScriptAPI. - Remove the need to assign Mousewheel in Actions or edit Mouse Modifiers. - Apply the exact 24-step ACID zoom ladder and both hard limits. - Release Mousewheel immediately when the toolbar mode is disabled.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: - Force the native arrange grid to draw every measured ACID subdivision. - Set the minimum native grid-line spacing to 1 px while ACID mode is active. - Make native snapping follow the visible ACID grid division. - Restore both REAPER preferences when ACID mode is disabled.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: - Give the ReaPack toolbar action a unique versioned name. - Prevent old manually-loaded scripts from being confused with the installed action. - Verify that SWS actually applied the native 1 px grid spacing and report a clear error if it did not.

version.author: 2TDaSerra, OpenAI Codex
version.changelog: - Keep levels 0-20 fully native and clamp the native grid to REAPER's real 1/1024 limit. - Add only the missing 1/2048 and 1/4096 subdivisions at levels 21-23 using a single direct arrange-view bitmap. - Snap simple arrange clicks to the exact ACID interval at the final three levels. - Leave drags, time selections, loop points and mouse modifiers under native REAPER control. - Debounce bitmap recreation while resizing to avoid lag, flashing and stale overlay windows.
